$comment: Tool-agnostic catalog of the ADLC toolkit. The build script (scripts/build.mjs) reads this plus the frontmatter of each core/skills/*.md and core/agents/*.md file, then emits per-tool adapter stubs. Only metadata NOT present in the source frontmatter lives here.

skills.name: init
skills.summary: Bootstrap the .adlc/ vault in a new repo.

skills.name: wrapup
skills.summary: Draft PR + lessons + vault updates + git checklist. Phase 5.

skills.name: proceed
skills.summary: Run all five phase skills with gates between.

skills.name: ship
skills.summary: Autonomous pipeline — runs all five phases, routing each gate through the decision-maker; ends in one terminal human review.

skills.name: status
skills.summary: Show every active REQ and gate state.

skills.name: recover
skills.summary: Reconcile pipeline-state with git reality; back-fill the vault.

skills.name: config
skills.summary: View/change .adlc/config.yml settings via guided options; re-sync derived files.

agents.name: codebase-explorer
agents.role: One structured recon pass: similar patterns, blast radius, integration points.

agents.name: task-implementer
agents.role: Writes code for one task. No git operations.

agents.name: quality-reviewer
agents.role: Conventions, naming, duplication, test coverage. Read-only.

agents.name: architecture-reviewer
agents.role: Layering, separation of concerns, API contracts. Read-only.

agents.name: architecture-adversary
agents.role: Adversarial pre-gate attack on the design + task plan; hunts omissions, surfaces only self-refuted findings. Read-only.

agents.name: ui-reviewer
agents.role: Runtime UI/UX review — runs the app in a browser to verify render, flows, and design match. Browser mechanism auto-resolves and degrades. Read-only re: source.

agents.name: performance-scanner
agents.role: API cost + DB perf + latency for /optimize. Read-only.

agents.name: pipeline-runner
agents.role: Runs the full pipeline for one REQ in a worktree for /sprint. No sub-agents. Git per git.mode — feature branch only, never main/force/PR.

agents.name: decision-maker
agents.role: Adjudicates one pipeline gate during an autonomous /ship run — APPROVE / REWORK / HALT with confidence + cited evidence. Conservative by default; escalates on doubt.

tierToModel.$comment: Default model mapping per assistant. Override via .adlc/config.yml. Strings are best-effort current model IDs; tools that don't accept a model field ignore these.

sources.$comment: External systems a project can SEED artifacts from. Declared per project in .adlc/config.yml -> sources; this catalog tells /init what to offer and tells skills which phases may use each service, with what read/write capability, via which mechanisms (auto-resolved at runtime, first that works wins). Reads are default-on for a declared service; writes require the service in config sources.write and are always gated.

issues.comment: Read seeds /spec and /bugfix Phase 1 from a ticket; write (gated, opt-in) posts PR links / transitions issues at /wrapup and /bugfix Phase 5.

design.comment: Read seeds /architect UI/component specs from a frame.

mechanisms.$comment: Resolution order per service, first that works wins. Declared as a hint; actual availability is detected at runtime and degrades to manual authoring.
